Several sources describing the July 2025 opening cite a flat introductory $8/$10 resident/non-resident rate, which appears to have been the rate at launch before a small increase to $8.25/$10.50.

weather: East Bay bayside flatland climate immediately north of Berkeley/Albany -- cool, breezy, and prone to summer marine-layer fog and onshore wind off San Francisco Bay, especially mornings and evenings. El Cerrito's hillside (eastern) neighborhoods sit above some of the fog that blankets the flats, but Castro Park itself is on the flatland side near the BART corridor, so it gets the fuller onshore-wind/overcast pattern; play typically warms and clears by midday even in summer.
surface: Outdoor hard court -- 6 dedicated pickleball courts, converted from 2 former tennis courts in a 2025 renovation.
